title: READY FOR KINDERGARTEN - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS SCHOOL DISTRICT 7 READY FOR KINDERGARTEN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Teaches parents and guardians important skills that children should acquire before starting school. Dinner and child care are provided. 725 North East Dean Drive Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: 5 years old Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 474-5709 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-5709 Marisa Arteaga [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Community Meals Preschools School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING WORKSHOPS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - PARENT AND CHILD PLAYGROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
